ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the event organizers */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of volunteers the event can accommodate */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the opportunity belongs to */,
  "opportunity_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity (e.g., scoreboard, grill, hospitality) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the opportunity */,
  "eligibility" INTEGER /* ID of the eligibility criteria for the opportunity */,
  "status" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the opportunity */,
  "signup" INTEGER /* ID of the signup status of the opportunity */,
  "max_volunteers" INTEGER /* Maximum number of volunteers the opportunity can accommodate */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the opportunity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the opportunity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_signup FOREIGN KEY ("signup") REFERENCES signups ("signup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_eligibility FOREIGN KEY ("eligibility") REFERENCES eligibilities ("eligibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "volunteer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the volunteer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the volunteer */,
  "skills" TEXT /* JSON array of skills the volunteer possesses */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the volunteer (e.g., Member, Non-Member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the volunteer was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the volunteer's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_opportunities" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity */,
  "role" TEXT /* The specific role the volunteer will play in the opportunity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the volunteer's signup (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer signed up for the opportunity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signup was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the signup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id", "opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., sports, charity, fundraising) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligibilities" (
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility criteria */,
  "eligibility_name" TEXT /* Name of the eligibility criteria (e.g., All Members, Intermediate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the eligibility criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the eligibility criteria was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the eligibility criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eligibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opportunity status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signups" (
  "signup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signup status */,
  "signup_name" TEXT /* Name of the signup status (e.g., Sign up, Full) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signup status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signup status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the signup status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recurring_events" (
  "recurring_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recurring event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that recurs */,
  "recurrence_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the recurrence pattern */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the recurrence pattern */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recurring event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recurring event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recurring_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recurring_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_dependencies" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity */,
  "dependent_opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent opportunity */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., prerequisite, co-requisite) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id", "dependent_opportunity_id")
)
